series_metadata.series_description: When a facility that houses controlled substances must log the dangerous drugs that were destroyed, sign and send to the Ohio Pharmacy Board. Records include drug name, strength, quantity and who destroyed and witnessed the destruction of the drugs.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Paper: Scan or retain on site for 1 year and offsite for 4 years. ; Electronic: Electronic: retain on server for 5 years, Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
